meaning: n.(画的)小型草图 (雕塑等的)泥(或石)制雏形
examples: One method to make casting sand mold directly from the bozzetto (mud draft) of the sculpture is introduced.
Abstract: One method to make casting sand mold directly from the bozzetto (mud-draft) of the sculpture is introduced.
Bruno Bozzetto is a well-known Italian master of animation, whose masterpiece Allegro Non Troppo has a unique artistic style.
